headline: Manager Ends Email With 'Sent from my iPhone' But He Has An Android, Now Nobody Trusts Him
summary: The lie has called his entire leadership into question. 'What else is he hiding?' employees whisper.
fullBody: Dave McDeceiver sent a company-wide email with the signature 'Sent from my iPhone.' Dave has a Samsung. 'It's aspirational,' Dave explained. His team has launched an internal investigation. 'If he lies about his phone, what else?' one employee asked. Dave's parking spot now has a sticky note that says 'Sent from my imagination.' Dave has changed his signature to 'Sent from a device' and is 'taking a break from technology.'
